◎译　　名　年轻食尸鬼的赞歌 / 药头少女大逃杀(台)
◎片　　名　Rhymes for Young Ghouls
◎年　　代　2013
◎产　　地　加拿大
◎类　　别　剧情
◎语　　言　英语

◎简　　介  

　　Red Crow Mi'gMaq reservation, 1976: By government decree, every Indian child under the age of 18 must attend residential school. In the kingdom of the crow, that means imprisonment at St. Dymphna's. That means being at the mercy of "Popper", the sadistic Indian agent who runs the school.

introduction: Red Crow Mi'gMaq reservation, 1976: By government decree, every Indian child under the age of 18 must attend residential school. In the kingdom of the crow, that means imprisonment at St. Dymphna's. That means being at the mercy of "Popper", the sadistic Indian agent who runs the school.
